div1.entryFree:
Determination, 1) circumscription, limit: so should that beauty which you hold in lease find no d. Sonn. 13, 6.
2) decision: he humbles himself to the d. of justice, Meas. III, 2, 258. to make up a free d. 'twixt right and wrong, Troil. II, 2, 170.
3) resolution: did she change her d.? Wiv. III, 5, 69. acquainted me with their --s, Merch. I, 2, 111. would you were of our d. H4A IV, 3, 33. I have in quick d. thus set it down, Hml. III, 1, 176.
